name: native-select-groups
visual_summary: The native-select-groups component is a visually appealing and interactive dropdown menu that allows users to select one or multiple options. It is ideal for scenarios where a user needs to select a category, filter results, or configure settings. This component can be used in a variety of contexts, from user profiles to product filtering.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready select component with the following characteristics:

Name: native-select-groups
Description: The native-select-groups component is a visually appealing and interactive dropdown menu that allows users to select one or multiple options. It is ideal for scenarios where a user needs to select a category, filter results, or configure settings. This component can be used in a variety of contexts, from user profiles to product filtering.
Style: e.g. dark, material-ui
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: dropdown, menu, multiselect, option, settings, user-profile

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
